safety_controls_found.control: strict common-window cleaning, ffill limit 5, dropna, min 60 observations
fatal circuit breaker for daily absolute variance >40%; despiking warning for >15%
Ledoit-Wolf shrinkage, sample covariance fallback, PSD fix, symmetry enforcement
portfolio variance is floored at zero before sqrt; empty weights/mu/S return zero metrics
synthetic optimizer, feasibility, suitability, and quant_core tests passed

runtime_safety_issues.title: negative output weights are not explicitly rejected after normalization
runtime_safety_issues.risk: Negative or non-finite upstream weights can leak into output if they appear despite long-only solver assumptions.
runtime_safety_issues.recommendation: Add final finite/non-negative/sum invariant check before returning weights.

runtime_safety_issues.title: mu/S finite checks are implicit
runtime_safety_issues.evidence: optimizer_core.py:959-1018 builds mu/S then EfficientFrontier without explicit finite assertion
runtime_safety_issues.risk: If expected returns or covariance contain NaN/Inf after library calls, failure will surface as solver exception/fallback rather than structured data-quality block.
runtime_safety_issues.recommendation: Precheck np.isfinite(mu) and np.isfinite(S), returning structured error when invalid.

runtime_safety_issues.title: risk-free rate has external/network/cache side effects and static fallback
runtime_safety_issues.risk: Two identical requests can differ by RF cache/source timing; cache write creates side effect.
runtime_safety_issues.recommendation: Return rf_source/rf_timestamp and allow no-write/no-network mode for audit/dry-run.

runtime_safety_issues.title: frontend algebraic volatility can become NaN if covariance matrix is not PSD
runtime_safety_issues.risk: Backend usually fixes PSD, but malformed frontend matrix can render NaN in displayed point.
runtime_safety_issues.recommendation: Mirror backend max(0, variance) and finite checks in frontend display helper.

runtime_safety_issues.title: hidden randomness exists in synthetic series helper but is not part of current optimizer path
runtime_safety_issues.evidence: data_fetcher.py:347-360 uses np.random.seed only when seed supplied
runtime_safety_issues.risk: If synthetic series are reintroduced without explicit seed, output reproducibility can degrade.
runtime_safety_issues.recommendation: Require seed/run_id for any synthetic-data optimizer path.
